description: Exact core classically conformal SU(2)_D doublet model was already studied for NANOGrav 12.5-year FOPT interpretation in arXiv:2109.11558; model-level novelty is low.
required_solution: Compare only as updated/recomputed PTA likelihood result, not as a new model claim.

description: Minimal model fixes Higgs portal coupling to zero and treats the dark sector as secluded.
required_solution: Specify a thermal origin or nonzero portal extension, or state that portal searches and thermal-SM constraints are not directly testable.

description: No thermal history, dark-sector temperature ratio, decoupling history, reheating partition, relic abundance, or entropy transfer observable was computed.
affected_outputs: BBN/CMB constraints | Delta N_eff | interpretation of sub-GeV transition
required_solution: Implement thermal_history.py/cosmo_constraints.py with T_dark/T_SM, entropy evolution, FOPT energy partition, and BBN/CMB likelihood mapping.
source_note: Constraint stage requires new backend for core cosmological observables.

description: No relic abundance or fractional dark-vector DM abundance was computed, so vector-DM claims and self-interaction bounds cannot be applied.
required_solution: Compute Omega_WD/Omega_DM for the assumed thermal/nonthermal history and document whether W_D is stable and cosmologically relevant.

description: No non-Abelian vector self-interaction transfer or viscosity cross section sigma/m(v) was computed.
required_solution: Implement self_interactions.py for dwarf, Milky Way, and cluster velocities with unit conversion and transfer/viscosity convention.
source_note: Mass and coupling alone cannot test SIDM bounds.

description: FOPT calculation uses a semianalytic conformal high-temperature/polynomial backend with Gaussian percolation approximation.
required_solution: Cross-check selected benchmarks with a full finite-temperature effective-potential/bounce calculation and alternate percolation criteria.

description: Single-field Coleman-Weinberg radial background is assumed; portal, dark fermions, extra scalars, daisy thermal-mass scans, and RG-running scans are omitted.
affected_outputs: phase-transition strength | mass spectrum | theoretical validity
required_solution: Add controlled variations for portal, extra matter, RG scale, and thermal-mass prescriptions if making robustness claims.

description: PTA analysis uses DBF template for very large-alpha points; wall velocity and microscopic efficiency are not independently computed.
affected_outputs: PTA fit | GW amplitude | spectral shape
required_solution: Compute or marginalize wall velocity and efficiency, compare DBF/BF/Higgsless templates only within documented validity domains.
source_note: DBF selected by regime with explicit validity warning.

description: No perfect 14/14 PTA violin benchmark was found; best direct scan benchmark reaches 13/14 bins.
required_solution: Report as near-match only and avoid claiming all violin bins are covered by a direct benchmark.

description: Initial PTArcade final run hit the upper log10_vD prior boundary and was rerun with a wider prior; posterior boundary sensitivity remains a required caveat.
required_solution: Inspect final chains for boundary contact, rerun with still-wider/alternative priors if posterior support approaches limits.
source_note: Archived prior-boundary chain and widened-prior rerun documented.

description: Final PTArcade MAP has extremely large alpha and f_peak_est above nominal PTA steering band; f_peak_est is approximate while DBF spectrum is fitted.
required_solution: Assess MAP validity using full spectrum, template domain, and prior-boundary diagnostics rather than f_peak_est alone.

description: Constraint stage claims no exclusions mainly because required cosmological, portal, abundance, and self-interaction observables are missing.
required_solution: Phrase constraint result as unconstrained/not testable with current observables, not as physically allowed.
source_note: Only one direct theory check; seven constraints require new backend.

description: Sub-GeV strongly supercooled FOPT can affect BBN/CMB through energy release or dark radiation, but visible/dark reheating and Delta N_eff are not mapped.
required_solution: Compute dark radiation, entropy injection, and BBN/CMB likelihood for the fitted posterior region.
source_note: Core cosmological constraints require thermal history.

description: Pipeline adopts m_WD(chi)=gD*chi/2 despite a convention tension in arXiv:2109.11558.
required_solution: Keep the critic-authoritative convention in all local code and avoid directly importing same-paper benchmark masses without conversion.

description: Perturbative finite-temperature effective potential in conformal models has gauge/daisy/RG prescription dependence not quantified by the scan.
required_solution: Run gauge/prescription/RG-scale variations or use gauge-invariant diagnostics where possible.
source_note: Gauge dependence and daisy prescription flagged upstream.

description: FOPT and PTA scans use finite chosen ranges for gD and vD; conclusions are conditional on these prior/range choices.
required_solution: State all ranges and rerun boundary expansions when best points or posterior mass approach limits.
source_note: FOPT gD [0.25,3.2], vD [1e-5,0.8] GeV; PTA priors differ.

description: PTArcade evidence is null in the handoff, so model comparison against alternatives is not available.
required_solution: Compute evidence with controlled error or restrict claims to posterior fit quality.

description: Portal-based collider, direct-detection, and beam-dump constraints are not applicable only under the exact zero-portal minimal assumption; any portal extension reopens them.
required_solution: Maintain a separate constraint recast for nonzero portal variants.
